payload.title: Deterministic replay: events → scope.db projection
payload.description:
Build the deterministic projection: replay(events) -> scope.db.

## Work
- Sort events by (ts, ULID id) for a total, reproducible order across peers.
- Fold each event into the materialized tables; rebuild FTS + ticket_history.
- Run replay on cold start when the db is missing/stale, and after every sync that brings in new event files.

## Acceptance
- replay is pure and idempotent: same event set -> same db, regardless of file arrival order.
- Round-trip: delete scope.db, replay, get an identical board.
